message:
Update beads issue tracker metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -487,8 +487,8 @@
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","title":"Integrate accepted OQ decisions into specs, parity tracking, and executable backlog","description":"## Objective
Perform closure sweep after OQ decisions so all canonical docs and dependent work items reflect accepted outcomes.

## Scope
1. Update spec + architecture docs with final OQ statuses.
2. Update FEATURE_PARITY notes where decisions alter tracked behavior.
3. Create/adjust follow-on implementation beads for any accepted policy changes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- No OQ section remains stale after decision completion.
- Linked implementation beads exist for every non-trivial accepted change.
- Drift audit confirms docs, backlog, and code intent are synchronized.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.
## Decision-Closure Validation Addendum
Because this bead may produce policy/spec decisions before code lands, closure requires:
1. An executable validation matrix mapping each accepted decision to concrete unit-test and E2E scenarios.
2. Explicit follow-on implementation beads (or updates to existing beads) carrying those scenarios into code/tests.
3. Structured logging expectations for decision-sensitive branches (required fields + failure classes).
4. Evidence that no accepted policy remains without a corresponding testable implementation path.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:10:02.080201930Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_oq_closure","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.6.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:43.116358516Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":306,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.6.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add/extend crate-local unit tests for happy path, edge/boundary cases, and error paths.
- Include at least one negative/invariant test proving the failure mode is handled intentionally.

2. E2E Scripts (required)
- Add/extend deterministic E2E coverage under scripts/e2e/ (or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- E2E output must include machine-parseable pass/fail markers and scenario identifiers.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Add structured logs at key state transitions and error boundaries (debug/info/warn/error as appropriate).
- Log fields must include operation/scenario identifiers so incidents are traceable.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) that verify critical log markers are emitted for success and failure paths.

4. Validation Gates (required)
- Run via rch where applicable: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + targeted E2E script(s).
- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:37Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.7","title":"EPIC: Operator Tooling, Runbooks, and Observability Polish","description":"# EPIC: Operator Tooling, Runbooks, and Observability Polish

## Problem Statement
Core mechanics are present, but operator experience for diagnosis/recovery still depends heavily on source familiarity. Post-parity maturity requires turning expert-only workflows into routine, documented, observable operations.

## Scope
1. Tighten evidence/inspection UX for incident diagnosis.
2. Add runbook-grade procedures for common failure classes.
3. Ensure CLI/TUI signals map clearly to actionable next steps.

## Done Criteria
- Incident workflows are reproducible from runbooks + CLI outputs.
- Critical runtime states (degradation, replay, repair) are visible and interpretable.
- Documentation reflects actual operator paths, not aspirational architecture.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:49:23.074988633Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:10:09.490331930Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_operator_experience"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:49:23.074988633Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":301,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Future-self note:
Operator polish should be validated by drills. If runbooks are never executed in simulated incidents, they are documentation theater.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:55:08Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","title":"Write runbooks for replay failure, corruption recovery, and pressure incidents","description":"## Objective
Provide step-by-step operator procedures for top incident classes so recovery does not depend on tribal knowledge.

## Runbooks Required
1. Replay/open failure triage.
2. Corruption detection + repair decision workflow.
3. Backpressure/degradation investigation.
4. Safe escalation/rollback checkpoints.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Each runbook includes prerequisites, exact commands, expected outputs, and stop conditions.
- Runbooks are validated by at least one dry-run execution.
- Linked from README or operator docs index.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:49.616534860Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T17:28:57.803816944Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T17:28:57.802938890Z","close_reason":"Created 3 operator runbooks (replay-failure-triage, corruption-recovery, backpressure-investigation) with decision trees, ffs CLI commands, structured log references, and stop conditions. E2E gate ffs_runbooks_e2e.sh validates all 4 runbooks (including pre-existing perf-regression-triage) pass 9/9 scenarios.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_operator_experience","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:35.946149261Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:36.133387359Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:38.389796008Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:49.616534860Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":328,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add/extend crate-local unit tests for happy path, edge/boundary cases, and error paths.
- Include at least one negative/invariant test proving the failure mode is handled intentionally.

2. E2E Scripts (required)
- Add/extend deterministic E2E coverage under scripts/e2e/ (or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- E2E output must include machine-parseable pass/fail markers and scenario identifiers.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Add structured logs at key state transitions and error boundaries (debug/info/warn/error as appropriate).
- Log fields must include operation/scenario identifiers so incidents are traceable.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) that verify critical log markers are emitted for success and failure paths.

4. Validation Gates (required)
- Run via rch where applicable: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + targeted E2E script(s).
- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:42Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-h6nz.7.2","title":"Add operator-oriented evidence query presets and summary views","description":"## Objective
Make `ffs evidence` output immediately useful during incidents by adding curated preset views and concise summaries.

## Scope
1. Preset filters for replay anomalies, repair failures, and pressure transitions.
2. Human-readable summary mode with links to raw event IDs.
3. JSON schema stability tests for automation consumers.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Operators can retrieve key incident evidence with one command per scenario.
- Summary and raw outputs are cross-referencable.
- Presets are documented and covered by CLI tests.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)

- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:57.807396461Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T17:29:38.161322845Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_operator_experience","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:36.560221939Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:38.549076487Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:52:57.807396461Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":327,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

-{"id":"bd-h6nz.7.3","title":"Ensure CLI/TUI/log surfaces report consistent runtime health state","description":"## Objective
Eliminate contradictory operator signals by validating consistency across CLI, TUI, and structured logs for core health dimensions.

## Scope
1. Define canonical health fields (mode, degradation level, replay status, repair status).
2. Add consistency checks/tests across reporting surfaces.
3. Document single source-of-truth priority when values diverge temporarily.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Consistency tests fail if surfaces drift on canonical fields.
- Operator docs define where to trust values during transitions.
- Runtime state snapshots are aligned within expected propagation windows.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:06.775705145Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:39.195287198Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_operator_experience","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:38.713250192Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:36.740861804Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.3","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:06.775705145Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":326,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add/extend crate-local unit tests for happy path, edge/boundary cases, and error paths.
- Include at least one negative/invariant test proving the failure mode is handled intentionally.

2. E2E Scripts (required)
- Add/extend deterministic E2E coverage under scripts/e2e/ (or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- E2E output must include machine-parseable pass/fail markers and scenario identifiers.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Add structured logs at key state transitions and error boundaries (debug/info/warn/error as appropriate).
- Log fields must include operation/scenario identifiers so incidents are traceable.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) that verify critical log markers are emitted for success and failure paths.

4. Validation Gates (required)
- Run via rch where applicable: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + targeted E2E script(s).
- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:41Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-h6nz.7.4","title":"Run operator tabletop drills and capture remediation deltas","description":"## Objective
Validate operational readiness by running scripted incident drills and capturing documentation/tooling gaps discovered during execution.

## Drill Scenarios
1. Mount failure due to replay anomaly.
2. Corruption detected with partial repair success.
3. Sustained pressure causing throttle/shed behavior.

## Deliverables
- Drill transcripts and timings.
- Gap list with follow-on beads where needed.
- Updated runbooks from observed friction.

## Acceptance Criteria
- At least one drill per scenario completed end-to-end.
- Post-drill retro identifies concrete improvements, not generic notes.
- New remediation beads created for critical misses.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:11.934305728Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:10:09.813582142Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_operator_experience","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:11.934305728Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:11.934305728Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:11.934305728Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.4","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:53:11.934305728Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":339,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Plan-space revision (quality contract, mandatory before closure):

1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add/extend crate-local unit tests for happy path, edge/boundary cases, and error paths.
- Include at least one negative/invariant test proving the failure mode is handled intentionally.

2. E2E Scripts (required)
- Add/extend deterministic E2E coverage under scripts/e2e/ (or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- E2E output must include machine-parseable pass/fail markers and scenario identifiers.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Add structured logs at key state transitions and error boundaries (debug/info/warn/error as appropriate).
- Log fields must include operation/scenario identifiers so incidents are traceable.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) that verify critical log markers are emitted for success and failure paths.

4. Validation Gates (required)
- Run via rch where applicable: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + targeted E2E script(s).
- Closure comment must summarize test evidence and logging-evidence locations.","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:58:44Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","title":"Verification Gate: operator tooling/runbooks/observability (unit + e2e + logging audit)","description":"## Objective
Final acceptance gate for bd-h6nz.7 proving operators can diagnose and act without source-level archaeology.

## Required Validation
1. Unit/integration checks for CLI evidence presets, health-state consistency, and schema stability.
2. E2E incident drill scripts validating runbook commands, expected outputs, and stop/escalation conditions.
3. Structured-log/evidence audit proving scenario IDs and operation IDs support incident traceability end-to-end.

## Required Logging Detail
- Incident drill logs include scenario_id, start/end timestamps, operator actions, and outcome classification.
- Evidence query logs include correlation IDs linking summary views to raw event streams.
- Recovery-path logs include explicit failure-reason taxonomy and next-step guidance.

## Gate Commands
- rch exec -- cargo test --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-cli -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-tui -- --nocapture
- operator drill E2E script pack with transcript + artifact validation

## Acceptance Criteria
- Incident drills are reproducible from docs and scripts.
- Tooling surfaces are consistent, traceable, and actionable.
- Remaining operator friction items are converted into follow-on beads with clear ownership.
## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.204168110Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:09:32.890318465Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_operator_experience","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.204168110Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.204168110Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.204168110Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.204168110Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:59:18.204168110Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:53.991232263Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.9.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:09:32.890265816Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":345,"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Mandatory closure checklist (verification):
- Comprehensive unit tests updated (happy path + edge + error).
- Deterministic E2E scripts updated with scenario IDs and machine-parseable pass/fail output.
- Structured logging added/validated at critical transitions and failure boundaries; key log markers asserted in tests.
- Gate evidence captured via rch-offloaded checks/tests and attached in closure comment.","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:00:16Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-h6nz.7.6","title":"Standardize operator-facing error taxonomy and remediation hints across CLI/TUI/evidence","description":"## Objective
Standardize user-facing error taxonomy and remediation guidance so operators get clear, consistent, actionable recovery paths across CLI, TUI, and evidence outputs.

## Scope
1. Define canonical error classes (configuration, compatibility boundary, replay, repair, pressure/degradation, I/O/corruption, unsupported operation).
2. Map each class to stable machine-readable codes and concise human-readable remediation guidance.
3. Ensure CLI/TUI/evidence surfaces present aligned wording, code, and next-action hints.
4. Add runbook cross-links from error codes to exact remediation procedures.

## User Value
- Faster incident triage for non-authors.
- Lower risk of incorrect recovery actions.
- Better automation ergonomics via stable error codes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Error-class contract is documented and referenced by operator docs.
- At least 10 representative failure scenarios emit stable codes and actionable hints.
- Surface-consistency tests fail on wording/code drift.

## Mandatory Test & Logging Contract
1. Unit Tests (required)
- Add or extend crate-local tests for happy path, boundary/edge cases, and explicit error paths.
- Include at least one invariant-focused negative test proving failure handling is intentional.

2. Deterministic E2E Scripts (required)
- Add or extend deterministic E2E coverage (prefer `scripts/e2e/` or existing harness E2E path) with explicit setup/teardown.
- Every scenario must emit machine-parseable pass/fail markers plus stable `scenario_id` values.

3. Structured Logging (required)
- Emit structured logs at key state transitions and failure boundaries.
- Critical events must include `operation_id`, `scenario_id`, and outcome/error classification fields.
- Add test assertions (unit/integration/E2E) validating critical log markers for both success and failure paths.

4. Validation Evidence (required)
- Closure must include artifact paths and concise evidence summary for tests + logs.
- CPU-intensive gates must be run via `rch exec -- ...` when invoking cargo builds/checks/tests/benches.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:49.499726130Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:53.825687949Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lane_operator_experience","qa_e2e_required","qa_structured_logging_required","qa_unit_required"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:53.498710755Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:53.663266787Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:53.825625242Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-h6nz.7.6","depends_on_id":"bd-h6nz.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:06:49.499726130Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
